scripts.audit:supply-chain: cargo deny check && pnpm audit --audit-level moderate && node scripts/audit-npm-licenses.mjs
scripts.package:node: pnpm run build:node && pnpm --dir npm/fastsse_node run smoke && pnpm --dir npm/fastsse_node run pack:check
scripts.package:wasm: pnpm run build:wasm && node scripts/sync-wasm-package.mjs && node scripts/wasm-smoke.mjs && node scripts/wasm-package-pack-check.mjs
scripts.package:npm: pnpm run package:node && pnpm run package:wasm
scripts.package:dry-run: pnpm run package:crates && pnpm run package:npm
scripts.check: cargo check -p fastsse -p fastsse-node --all-targets && cargo check -p fastsse-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.lint: cargo clippy -p fastsse -p fastsse-node --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo clippy -p fastsse-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -- -D warnings
scripts.test: cargo test -p fastsse && cargo test -p fastsse-node
